title: Is it possible to obtain the url of an email & activity timeline item through API?

posts.author: douglas (Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml: so seems like email & activity timeline items have a specific format, so it does seem possible to construct manually. However, it will be nice to be able to obtain this through the Timeline API Timeline. Is there a related API that allows me to get this?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @douglas and welcome to the community!

It is not possible to do this via the API at the moment.

These are the fields you can retrieve.

I have switched this topic into a feature request so that our team is in the loop and other users can vote for it
